# Arranging plots {#sec-arranging-plots}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis
source("warning.R")
```

## Arranging multiple plots {#sec-arranging-multiple-plots}

## Side panels {#sec-side-panels}

## Converting base R plots to ggplot2 {#sec-converting-base-r-plots-to-ggplot2}
